prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约260名→506名→603名→432名→298名，整体呈先降后升的V形走势。2021–2023年位次持续后移（从260降至603），2 024年回升至432，2025年进一步回升至298，近两年回暖明显，2025年基准位次约298名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021–2024年均为23人，2025年缩减至2 1人，2026年进一步缩减至15人，较2025年缩招约28.6%。缩招意味着投放名额减少，在报考热度不变的情况下竞争将有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学为 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第18名（Top20），近年排名稳定在14–18区间，属于国内顶尖高校层次，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件及历史投档线异常信号；抖音综合热度排名第26（较热），短视频平台曝光度较高，有助于维持报考关注度；2025年声 誉同样偏负面（投档线暴跌信号），但2025年实际位次已大幅回升，表明负面舆情对实际录取的影响已逐步消化；同济大学拥有土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环 境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、建筑学A、交通运输工程A、风景园林学A等19个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出，对理科/物理类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 同济大学位于上海市，属于跨省报考；该校在海南省招生人数较少（2025年仅21人，2026年15人）， 占全国总招生比例极小，属于典型的外省优质高校小规模招生，位次波动受省内高分考生报考意愿变化影响较大；计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，与同济大学信息类、计算机类招生专业高度契合；土木建筑类专业热度从明显劝退转为分化观望，行业 信心有所修复。海南省考生总数从2021年约5.3万持续增长至2025年约6.7万，2026年预计约7.8万（增长约15.7%），考生规模扩大加剧了整体竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次298名、2026年招生计划 大幅缩招约28.6%（使位次趋前）、海南省考生总数显著增长约15.7%（使竞争加剧）、学校层次极高维持吸引力、声誉偏负面但已逐步消化、抖音热度较热维持关注度等多重因素 ，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（数字减小），预测最低位次约277名，位次区间227–327名。

- 工科试验班（计算机与电子类）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间227–327名内，建议以二档工科试验班（卓越计划班）为主力填报，一档国豪精英班和计算机与电子类作为冲刺，三档人文科学试验班作为保底。位次明显优于区 间下限（<227名）可重点冲刺国豪精英班；位次接近区间上限（>327名）建议以人文科学试验班为主，兼顾卓越计划班。口腔医学和临床医学（5+3一体化）属医学类单独招生， 位次参考不同，需另行评估。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hainan Province Comprehensive category were approximately 260 → 506 → 603 → 432 → 298, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing. Rankings continued to decline from 2021 to 2023 (from 260 to 603), rebounded to 432 in 2024, and further rebounded to 298 in 2025, with significant recovery in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 298. The enrollment plan for Tongji University in Hainan Province Comprehensive category: 23 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 21 students in 2025, and further reduced to 15 students in 2026, a reduction of about 28.6% compared to 2025. The reduction means fewer slots available, and with unchanged application enthusiasm, competition will intensify.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 14–18 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier domestic universities, with sustained appeal to high-scoring students. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents and abnormal historical admission score signals. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 26th (relatively hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, helping maintain application attention. The 2025 reputation was also slightly negative (signal of plummeting admission scores), but the actual ranking in 2025 has significantly rebounded, indicating that the impact of negative public opinion on actual admissions has been gradually absorbed. Tongji University has 19 A- and above disciplines including Civil Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Architecture A, Transportation Engineering A, and Landscape Architecture A, with strong engineering strength, attracting science/physics candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tongji University is located in Shanghai, belonging to cross-province application. The university enrolls a small number of students in Hainan Province (only 21 in 2025, 15 in 2026), accounting for a very small proportion of the total national enrollment, typical of small-scale enrollment from high-quality universities in other provinces, with ranking fluctuations greatly affected by changes in the willingness of high-scoring candidates within the province. Computer, electronic information/communication majors are highly popular and recommended, highly consistent with Tongji University's information and computer-related enrollment majors. Civil and architectural majors have shifted from obvious discouragement to differentiated observation, with industry confidence somewhat restored. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has continuously increased from about 53,000 in 2021 to about 67,000 in 2025, and is expected to be about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7%), with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 298 in 2025, the significant reduction of about 28.6% in the 2026 enrollment plan (pushing rankings forward), the significant increase of about 15.7% in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province (intensifying competition), the very high university level maintaining appeal, the slightly negative reputation but gradually absorbed, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity maintaining attention, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (number decreases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 277, and a ranking range of 227–327.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Guohao Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Electronics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 227–327, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class), with Tier 1 Guohao Elite Class and Computer and Electronics as reach options, and Tier 3 Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class as safety. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<227) can focus on reaching for Guohao Elite Class; rankings close to the upper limit (>327) should primarily apply for Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class, while also considering Excellence Plan Class. Stomatology and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) are separate medical enrollments with different ranking references and need separate evaluation.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 海南省同济大学医学类仅2024、2025年有录取数据。2024年医学类最低位次599名，计划招生2人（医学试验班口腔方向）；2025年最低位次575名，计划招生4人（医学试验班临 床方向），位次上升24名，扩招后竞争略有缓和。2026年医学类计划招生3人，较2025年减少1人（缩招25%），其中口腔医学2人、临床医学（5+3一体化）1人。计划缩减对位次产 生下行压力，但新增临床医学5+3一体化这一高分专业，对位次有向上支撑。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于上海市。作为国内顶尖综合性大学，其医学学科依托学校工科和理科优势 ，发展迅速，临床医学和口腔医学均具有较高社会认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学和口腔医学尤其受到高分考生青睐。同济大学地处上海，地域优势明显，对海南考生吸引力较强。2026年医学类在海南仅招3人， 招生规模极小，任何计划微调都会对位次产生明显影响。临床医学5+3一体化本硕衔接培养模式，对追求高学历的考生吸引力大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与专业结构变化，预测2026年同济大学医学类最低录取位次约为509名，较2025年上升66名（位次数字增大，难度略增）。主要原因是总计划缩减且新增临床医 学5+3一体化热门专业，竞争加剧。预计录取区间为479至539名。

一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内，临床医学（5+3一体化）仅招1人，竞争最为激烈，建议作为冲刺志愿；口腔医学招2人，可作为主攻志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Hainan Tongji University's medical category only has admission data for 2024 and 2025. In 2024, the minimum ranking for medical category was 599, with a planned enrollment of 2 (Medical Experimental Class, Dentistry direction); in 2025, the minimum ranking was 575, with a planned enrollment of 4 (Medical Experimental Class, Clinical Medicine direction), a ranking increase of 24, and competition slightly eased after expansion. In 2026, the medical category plans to enroll 3, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025 (a 25% reduction), including 2 for Dentistry and 1 for Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program). The reduction in plan exerts downward pressure on rankings, but the addition of the high-scoring Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program provides upward support for rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a national 985 Project and 211 Project construction university, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university, located in Shanghai. As a top comprehensive university in China, its medical disciplines leverage the university's engineering and science strengths, developing rapidly, with both Clinical Medicine and Dentistry having high social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with Clinical Medicine and Dentistry particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, with obvious regional advantages, attracting Hainan candidates. In 2026, the medical category only enrolls 3 in Hainan, with a very small enrollment scale, so any plan adjustment will significantly impact rankings. The Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program, with its bachelor-master combined training model, is highly attractive to candidates pursuing higher education.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and changes in major structure, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 509, an increase of 66 rankings compared to 2025 (ranking number increases, difficulty slightly increases). The main reason is the overall reduction in plan and the addition of the popular Clinical Medicine 5+3 Integrated Program, intensifying competition. The expected admission range is 479 to 539 rankings.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range, Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) only enrolls 1, with the most intense competition, recommended as a reach volunteer; Dentistry enrolls 2, can be used as a main volunteer.
